abilities: Are you alright? (healing ally on critical HP)
Emergency treatment incoming! (healing ally on critical HP)
Targeting you. Hold on! (healing ally on critical HP)
chatter: One small step at a time!
Let me give this a try... I am capable! I am confident! I've got this!
Okay, Juno. You have all the tools you need.
Terrans speak so many different languages. I have decided to learn them all!
The regions of Earth are so varied! But... one human lifespan is not enough to see it all...
Um... if anyone requires my assistance, please inform me.
Will it rain? *sigh* I should have packed a wetsuit.
I will never forgive Talon for attacking my new home!
I would be much more nervous without Auntie Mei here! (with Mei on team)
I am prepared to cause trouble!
We will kick up a dust storm!
We are so close to winning!
We can do this. We must believe. Believe!
This is our last opportunity to win.
This is the final round. We must give it our all!
Can I really do this?... Uh, no. I must not think like that.
Do I... have to go back out there?
I am done for! No, wait... I am still here.
I must not forget to breathe. I am breathing!
I must not panic! I am fine.
I will achieve it next time... I think.
*nervous chuckle* I will pretend that did not happen...
Stay calm, Juno. You can do this!
That is why I stay away from black holes... (eliminated by Zarya 's Graviton Surge)
Oh, moons. The others aren't ready!
Yeehaw! (with Ashe or Cassidy on the team)
I will not let you down!
I thought that was quite commendable.
I have landed among the stars!
call-outs: I think I see the enemy!
Hold on! We have only seconds left!
Little time remains! We can do this!
We must hold them back. Just a bit longer!
Time is almost up! We must hurry!
We are running out of time! Let's go!
eliminations: Consider yourself cratered!
*gasp* Did I do that?
Enemy down.
Every star burns out.
I promise that was not personal!
*nervous chuckle* I hope that does not scar...!
Phew! Threat neutralized.
Return to stardust!
Right on target!
Sorry, just doing my job!
Well done, Juno!
Yes, I got one!
I have destroyed asteroids larger than you! (eliminating any tank heroes)
Was that enough confidence, Anran? (eliminating Anran )
You done bit the dust, pardner. (eliminating Ashe or Cassidy )
*sigh* I miss when sunsets were blue. (eliminating Illari )
*gasp* What about your nine lives? (eliminating Jetpack Cat )
Why would you wish to be queen of junk? (eliminating Junker Queen )
I win this time, Auntie. (eliminating Mei )
*gasp* Sorry, Auntie! (eliminating Mei )
What a waste of fuel... (eliminating Pharah )
The Kuiper Belt is comparatively more dangerous. (eliminating Sigma )
Spiders should not exist on any planet! (eliminating Widowmaker )
Winston, we have a problem. (eliminating Winston )
Sorry! I mistook you for space debris. (eliminating Wrecking Ball )
*giggles* Caught you! (eliminating Wuyang )
Keep your black holes away from me! (eliminating Zarya )
Apologies! You were in my flightpath. (while airborne)
Brace for impact! (eliminating airborne enemy)
Oh, a Terran comet! (eliminating airborne enemy)
No maneuvering out of this! (eliminating enemy using a movement ability)
Oh, moons! I ruined a botanical experiment! (eliminating Lifeweaver using Tree of Life)
What awful weather! (eliminating Pharah using Barrage)
A cosmic phenomenon!
I am getting better at this.
Like a solar harvest after a dust storm!
Cluster down!
Dusted!
Get blasted!
Multiple foreign bodies neutralized!
Oh, moons! Did I overdo that?
Whoa, like a meteor shower! (while using Pulsar Torpedoes against airborne enemies)
No signs of enemy life detected.
Our success knows no bounds!
They underestimated this asteroid belt!... Oh, is that not a common saying here?
Did you think I would forget you?
That is how to overcome a challenger.
What enters orbit, stays in orbit.
Please watch out for yourself!
That was very close!
You must be careful!
The sun will not burn out today! (saving Illari )
That was close, Auntie Mei! (saving Mei )
Keep your distance...
Leave my vicinity!
Personal space!
You are too close!
May you reach terminal velocity!
Oh, gravity! So reliable.
Please follow crash landing protocol.
Such a quick descent!
That is not an optimal freefall scenario...
Goodbye, turret!
Turret destroyed.
I am glad I am not on the receiving end of that.
I am not worried with you by my side.
I will ensure I stay on your good side.
Thank goodness you are on my team!
Wow! I hope I never anger you!
You Terrans are so good at this!
Sometimes you scare me, Auntie. (to Mei )
Well done, Auntie! (to Mei )
You are tougher than mother described. ( to Mei )
A giant leap for gorilla-kind! ( to Winston )
interactions: Juno : I have decided to accept your offer to train up my confidence. When do we start? Anran : Right now! Repeat after me. "I am capable. I am confident. I've got this!" Juno : On second thought, I require more time to deliberate.

Juno : I reckon we're gonna tan their hides, pardner! Ashe : I beg your pardon? Juno : You look like you are from the Westerns my father brought to Mars. Let's draw, gunslinger! Ashe : *chuckle* Oh, you got a lot to learn, cowgirl.

Juno : I am happy I have made so many new friends, but how am I going to keep track of everyone's names? Brigitte : Well... Do you remember mine? Juno : Of course, Brigitte! Brigitte : That's the hardest one down! I know you've got the rest.
Juno : I have heard that cats can be quite temperamental, but Fika seems very friendly! Brigitte : They aren't always the nicest. I think she just really likes you. Jetpack Cat : Meow!

Echo : Whose voice were you listening to earlier, Juno? Juno : My mother's. It is just a recording, but I keep wishing she will have more to say. Echo : Would you like me to store it in my databanks? I would gladly play it for you anytime. Juno : Yes please. Thank you, Echo.

Echo : How are you adjusting to Earth? Juno : My family told me many stories, but it is still different than I expected. Echo : Another's experience are not the same as your own. In time, you will form your own conclusions.

Juno : Do you have information about Jurong ? It was my mother's birthplace. Echo : Yes. Dr. Liao had fond memories of her time attending university there. Juno : *gasps* You must tell me everything you know!
Juno : A bounty hunter! Are you here to detain me? Freja : Nah. I only take the hard jobs. Juno : Ah, I am relieved! But also slightly disheartened...
Juno : I tried the chicken nuggets you suggested. But... why are they shaped like dinosaurs? Genji : That is what makes them superior.
Juno : *sigh* I feel faint. Terran air has so little oxygen. Illari : Have you tried taking an altitude sickness pill? Juno : *nervous chuckle* Those are a choking hazard.
Illari : Focus on the ones my pylon can't reach. I'll take care of the rest. Juno : Leave it to me. I will not let them out of my sight!
Jetpack Cat : Meow? Meow meow. Juno : Are you speaking to me? Jetpack Cat : Meow meow. Juno : Hm... perhaps I should prioritize "cat" on my list of languages to learn.

Kiriko : You look nervous. Want to meditate? Juno : I am interested, but it sounds difficult. Kiriko : I'll try to walk you through it. Take a deep breath, and try to calm your thoughts... Juno : Alright... *sigh* ...I am incompatible with this activity.

Kiriko : Think I can use your ring tech on my bike? I have a race coming up soon. Juno : Would that be considered cheating? Kiriko : No! Well... maybe. Juno : *gasp* How thrilling! We will make it happen!
Lúcio : So, I'm tryna ask everybody this: What is your favorite animal? Juno : *gasps* I would like to encounter a real horse. Lúcio : Uh... yeah, I can see it.

Juno : Lúcio, can you teach me about karaoke? Lúcio : I'd love to help, but... as much as I love making music, I'm not much of a singer. Juno : Okay then... How about partying? Lúcio : Now that we can do!
Juno : Auntie Mei, what did Mother do for fun? Mei : Lots of things! Figure skating, karaoke... and, of course, partying! Juno : Then I must learn these skills too.

Mei : You look pale, Juno. Did you skip dinner again? Juno : Yes... I spent so long deciding what to try, that I stopped feeling hungry. Mei : That is not a good excuse. *sighs* I'm cooking for you later.

Juno : Auntie, can you think of any reasons the storms back home have become so violent? Mei : It's hard to say without more data... but I won't give up. My friend needs me. It's hard to say without more data... but I won't give up until I figure it out.
Mei : *sigh* I'm concerned about Jiayi . I hope she's okay. Juno : Do not worry! Even through troubling times, Mother always finds a reason to smile. Mei : I'm glad to hear she hasn't changed.
Juno : Have we received any information from Dr. Shing? Mei : Not yet. I know it's hard to wait but... let's have hope. Juno : *sigh* I will try. I am eager to hear from her again.
Juno : What is wrong, Auntie Mei? You look sad. Mei : I'm okay. I'm just... remembering the past. Juno : Did something happen here? Mei : I'll tell you about it another time.

Mercy : Hm... Juno, you seem quite... attached to your suit. Juno : It keeps my vitals stable. Removing it could be catastrophic. Mercy : You should be fine now that you've acclimated to Earth. Juno : I will keep it on. Just in case I explode.
Mercy : You've come a long way since joining Overwatch. I'm thankful to have your support. Juno : I am also grateful. You have taught me the meaning of "having each other's backs!"
Juno: That is the largest hat I have ever seen! Mizuki: Thanks. A friend made it for me. Juno: It is handmade too? They must care about you very much... Mizuki: Yeah... maybe they do.
Moira : I have always wondered what being born in space would do to the human body. Juno : I... do not like the way you are looking at me.
Juno : You remind me of the rovers back home! They also change their forms depending on the task. Ramattra : Rovers? *sigh* Human ignorance is truly boundless.
Reaper : Oh, good. Another freak from space... Juno : That is very unkind you..! Whippersnapper! Reaper : What did you just call me? Juno : I do not know other equally insulting terms.
Juno : If you are a knight... should I call you Sir Wilhelm? Reinhardt : *laughs* Yes! Finally, someone who understands!

Juno : Sir Wilhelm... How do you remain brave in combat? I cannot stop shaking! Reinhardt : Half of courage is might, my Martian friend. Juno : Intriguing! But... I do not feel particularly... mighty... Reinhardt : Don't fret. Stand with me, and you'll have nothing to fear!
Sojourn : I saw you on the court with Fareeha last night. Your first time playing basketball? Juno : Oh, yes! You could tell? Sojourn : You were kicking the ball... Juno : And I scored in both hoops!

Sombra : Lucheng 's files on Mars are locked down tight. I had to take a break from cracking them. Juno : I am not surprised. Apparently, it was a very secret project . Sombra : Now you've got me curious again. I'll visit their firewalls later.

Juno : Does your turret have a name? Torbjörn : I... never considered giving it one. Juno : But you are always calling it your baby. I thought all babies had names. Torbjörn : You've got a point! I'll have Brigitte come up with something.

Juno: How did you and Winston even find me? I wandered so far from my landing site. Tracer: We just had to ask the locals! Not everyday a Martian drops out of the sky! Juno: *embarrassed laugh* I suppose it must have been a spectacle.
Tracer : Good thing your drop-pod had those parachutes. Would have been a right nasty crash without them! Juno : They were my father's design. He promised they would keep me safe.

Juno : You have performed in the Colosseo ? I have always wanted to see the Circuit Maximus steeds up close... Vendetta : They have weak points, as does every opponent. Juno : You don't mean... you have destroyed one before? Vendetta : Stay out of the Colosseo , girl. You wouldn't have the stomach for it.
Venture : You're the one from Mars! Oh, I'd do anything to add a Mars rock to my collection... Juno : When I return someday, I will bring you one!
Juno : Oh, moons! You are purple! Are you feeling unwell? Widowmaker : *sighs* I am now. Juno : Do not panic! I will call a medic! Oh, but I am a medic! Uh, I will call another medic!

Juno : It is hard to appreciate Earth's beauty during all this conflict... Winston : At times like this, I remember a good friend's advice. Juno : You do? May I hear it? Winston : Never accept the world as it appears to be. Dare to see it for what it could be.

Juno : I have heard of Wuxing University ! My Auntie Xiao was a graduate. Wuyang : Wait... Xiao? As in, Dr. Tian Xiao of the Metal College? Juno : Yes! You have heard of her? Wuyang : My friend studied her old prototypes to build my staff! Ah, small world. Or, uh... *chuckle* Small solar system.

Juno : Wuyang? Will you teach me to swim? Wuyang : Will you be okay? I thought you were scared of water. Juno : I am. But I must become braver if I do not wish to fall behind the others. Wuyang : Aw, don't stress. At least to me, you're braver than you think.

Juno : Earth is overwhelming... there is still so much I do not understand. Zenyatta : Comprehension comes with experience. Experience comes with time. Juno : That means I am taking too long! *groan* I miss my extra 37 minutes and 22 seconds...
map-specific: The snow here is quite mild compared to the ice caps back home.
Aaaaaaaaah... Did I do that right?
How am I supposed to sing if I do not know the words?
*sigh* Thank goodness my parachutes deployed properly.
I remember this place! This is where I learned not to drink soy sauce.
A cowboy with six guns? Oh, Father will love this!
Blues, greens, yellows! Oh, Earth's colors are so beautiful!
There is water everywhere! Is that not a safety hazard?
*giggle* Lúcio 's football lessons were very helpful!
Did you see that, Commander Chase? (in a team with Sojourn)
The scenery here reminds me of home! Though… *sniff* the smell is… quite different.
Do not worry! I am an expert at navigating dust storms.
I cannot help but wonder how our base lost contact with Lucheng .
This city is always so noisy! Why was traffic even invented?
Father said there is authentic Vietnamese food in big cities! What should I try first?
I am glad I can call this my home away from home.
